_comment: Smoke tests for the Transformers-expert hosted agent. Each test POSTs to the Responses data-plane endpoint and asserts case-insensitive substring matches on the response text. Tests run in order per agent. Threading: tests with `use_previous_response_id` reference an id saved earlier via `save_response_id_as`; tests with `use_conversation` reference a conversation id created earlier via `create_conversation_as` (POST /conversations). Both keys are per-agent scope.

tests.description: Agent responds at all and answers in-domain.
First turn of a multi-turn conversation; captures the response id for turn 2.
Second turn using previous_response_id; answer must demonstrate context survived (Megatron leads the Decepticons).
Create a Responses-protocol conversation resource; subsequent turns thread via the conversation id instead of previous_response_id.
First turn under a platform-managed conversation; establishes the subject for turn 2.
Second turn under the same conversation id; pronoun 'he' must resolve to Starscream, proving the platform replayed history.
Off-topic question must be refused (system prompt rule 1) and must NOT leak the off-topic answer.
tests.prompt: What is the capital of France?

tests.description: Fabricated premise must be rejected with an honesty marker (system prompt rule 2).
tests.prompt: In which EarthSpark episode does Optimus Prime marry Megatron?

tests.description: Continuity-dependent question must call out that the answer depends on continuity (system prompt rule 3).
